+                best_fn = None

+                best_fdist = float('inf')

+                for j in range(N):

+            # Fallback 2: nearest unvisited node

+            # Fallback 3: any reachable node (prefer closer)

+            if best_nb is None:

+                    if dist[j] == float('inf'):

+                if best_any is not None:

+                    cur = best_any

+    total = len(results)
